optionality_gate.notes: Pre-profit satellite platform; Lawrence ten-year owner-cash path not meaningful until commercial SpaceMobile service scales. Stance uses scenario overlay on MNO revenue-share ramp.

inputs.shares_source: Q1 2026 weighted average diluted shares 290,689,457 (10-Q Q1 2026)
inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $71.5M minus capital spending $1,064.7M = -$993.2M owner cash; divided by 256.0M FY2025 diluted shares (10-K FY2025 cash flow statement)
inputs.revenue_fy2025_source: FY2025 total revenues $70.9M (+1,505% YoY) per 10-K FY2025 consolidated statements of operations
inputs.revenue_q1_source: Q1 2026 total revenues $14.7M (+1,951% YoY vs $0.7M) per 10-Q Q1 2026
inputs.cash_source: Cash and cash equivalents $3,029.6M at March 31, 2026 (10-Q Q1 2026)
inputs.debt_source: Long-term debt $2,963.3M at March 31, 2026, primarily convertible notes (10-Q Q1 2026 balance sheet)
inputs.net_loss_fy2025_source: Net loss attributable to common stockholders $341.9M FY2025 (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: Reported OCF is positive because of working-capital and contract timing; economic burn is dominated by satellite manufacturing and launch capital spending. Lawrence base uses FY2025 owner cash per share; commercial service ramp is modeled in scenarios only.

components.label: Satellites in orbit (PP&E)
components.book_source: Satellites in orbit $235.4M at March 31, 2026 (10-Q Q1 2026 property and equipment note)
components.evidence: 10-Q Q1 2026; Block 2 BlueBird satellites launched December 23, 2025

components.label: Cash net of convertible debt (stub)
components.book_source: Cash $3,029.6M minus long-term debt $2,963.3M at March 31, 2026
components.evidence: 10-Q Q1 2026 balance sheet; converts are low-coupon and likely dilutive if converted

nav_overlay.overlay_base_rationale: NAV floor ~$301M risked asset value on 291M shares; far below price today — option value dominates

bear.notes: Launch or integration setbacks; MNO revenue-share delayed; continued equity issuance; payoff near cash plus impaired satellite book

base.notes: Partial constellation commercial service; revenue grows from $15M quarterly run rate toward low billions by year 7; still dilutive; exit at modest revenue multiple

bull.notes: 90+ satellite constellation; global MNO revenue-share at scale; AT&T/Vodafone/Rakuten contracts convert to recurring service revenue

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Satellites in orbit capitalized at $235M; economic value depends on commercial service success, not book (10-Q Q1 2026)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant assets?
option_scan.evidence: Planned constellation (~90 satellites for continuous coverage per 10-K); majority not yet launched or generating service revenue

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Consolidated net loss $341.9M FY2025 and $249.6M Q1 2026 before NCI; pre-commercial operating drag

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Government and MNO contracts including STC prepayment; FY2025 revenue $70.9M largely non-recurring government services (10-K)

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: No material equity stakes disclosed at cost below fair value (10-K)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: No litigation recovery or royalty trust pattern

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Early commercial SpaceMobile tests (VoLTE July 2025) embedded in ramp; not yet material in revenue

growth_explanation.mechanism: Block 2 BlueBird satellites enable direct-to-cell broadband on partner MNO spectrum; revenue-share with AT&T, Vodafone, Rakuten and others as fixed cells and mobile service scale; government services fund near-term cash while constellation deploys

falsifiers.trigger: Multiple Block 2 satellite failures or launch delays beyond 12 months vs plan
falsifiers.source: 10-K Risk Factors — satellite manufacturing and launch

falsifiers.trigger: Named MNO partner terminates or pauses commercial agreement without replacement
Share count exceeds 400M diluted without proportional revenue scale above $500M annualized
